items.title: S01E01 - CULT 'Murder shrieks out'
items.summary: REPORT 5055 Strange and his team are called in after a performer with links to a charity organization dies under unusual circumstances. When the performer's singing partner is kidnapped, the case takes on an urgency that leads to answers that surprise everyone.

infolabels.title: CULT 'Murder shrieks out'
infolabels.plot: REPORT 5055 Strange and his team are called in after a performer with links to a charity organization dies under unusual circumstances. When the performer's singing partner is kidnapped, the case takes on an urgency that leads to answers that surprise everyone.

items.title: S01E02 - SKELETON 'Let Sleeping Heroes Lie'
items.summary: REPORT 0649 The remains of a Blitz victim found while clearing a site reveal the man was murdered first. Strange and his cohorts try to solve the nearly thirty years old case, but unexpected official resistance complicates things.

infolabels.title: SKELETON 'Let Sleeping Heroes Lie'
infolabels.plot: REPORT 0649 The remains of a Blitz victim found while clearing a site reveal the man was murdered first. Strange and his cohorts try to solve the nearly thirty years old case, but unexpected official resistance complicates things.

items.title: S01E03 - HOSTAGE 'If you won't learn, die!'
items.summary: REPORT 2641 A Chinese diplomat is kidnapped and a ransom note delivered. Strange must battle against the time table of the kidnappers and the outrage of the Chinese government to locate the missing man and secure his safe release.

infolabels.title: HOSTAGE 'If you won't learn, die!'
infolabels.plot: REPORT 2641 A Chinese diplomat is kidnapped and a ransom note delivered. Strange must battle against the time table of the kidnappers and the outrage of the Chinese government to locate the missing man and secure his safe release.

items.title: S01E04 - LONELYHEARTS 'Who killed Dan Cupid?'
items.summary: REPORT 0846 Strange is asked to look into the death of the founder of a dating society. As the investigation continues, he discovers the situation is far more complex than he imagined, and that he is slowly being drawn into a life-and-death situation.

infolabels.title: LONELYHEARTS 'Who killed Dan Cupid?'
infolabels.plot: REPORT 0846 Strange is asked to look into the death of the founder of a dating society. As the investigation continues, he discovers the situation is far more complex than he imagined, and that he is slowly being drawn into a life-and-death situation.

items.title: S01E05 - GRENADE 'What price change?'
items.summary: REPORT 8319 Two opposing factions at a university are planning various activities to protest about the setting-up of a defence research unit on site. Ham Gynt goes back to university to study the roots of the potentially explosive situation on the campus.

infolabels.title: GRENADE 'What price change?'
infolabels.plot: REPORT 8319 Two opposing factions at a university are planning various activities to protest about the setting-up of a defence research unit on site. Ham Gynt goes back to university to study the roots of the potentially explosive situation on the campus.

items.title: S01E06 - COVER GIRLS 'Last year's model'
items.summary: REPORT 3906 The latest designs of an exclusive fashion house are stolen just before an important show, then mysteriously returned. Strange and Kaz determine they were copied and put back, and possible suspects are many.

infolabels.title: COVER GIRLS 'Last year's model'
infolabels.plot: REPORT 3906 The latest designs of an exclusive fashion house are stolen just before an important show, then mysteriously returned. Strange and Kaz determine they were copied and put back, and possible suspects are many.

items.title: S01E07 - Epidemic - 'A Most Curious Crime'
items.summary: Report 3424 Adam finds himself facing a man who turns blood into gold - by smuggling illegal immigrants into the country and making vast profits from their misery. With Ham's help, he teaches the rogue a lesson.

infolabels.title: Epidemic - 'A Most Curious Crime'
infolabels.plot: Report 3424 Adam finds himself facing a man who turns blood into gold - by smuggling illegal immigrants into the country and making vast profits from their misery. With Ham's help, he teaches the rogue a lesson.

items.title: S01E08 - REVENGE 'When a man hates'
items.summary: REPORT 2475 A man hunts the men who put him in prison. His suffering wife slowly realizes his goal. Will she do the right thing, and will it be too late for Strange?

infolabels.title: REVENGE 'When a man hates'
infolabels.plot: REPORT 2475 A man hunts the men who put him in prison. His suffering wife slowly realizes his goal. Will she do the right thing, and will it be too late for Strange?

items.title: S01E09 - SHRAPNEL 'The wish in the dream'
items.summary: REPORT 1021 A piece of shrapnel in a dead man's body reveals an unexpected twist in an eternal triangle that reaches out of the past. Called in to attend the autopsy. Adam Strange finds himself personally involved.

infolabels.title: SHRAPNEL 'The wish in the dream'
infolabels.plot: REPORT 1021 A piece of shrapnel in a dead man's body reveals an unexpected twist in an eternal triangle that reaches out of the past. Called in to attend the autopsy. Adam Strange finds himself personally involved.

items.title: S01E10 - HAND 'A matter of witchcraft'
items.summary: REPORT 8944 Adam and Ham find themselves immersed in the chilling world of witchcraft when a beautiful young office secretary is murdered in brutal circumstances. Murder is one thing but as Adam finds out - the black-magic variety is difficult to solve.

infolabels.title: HAND 'A matter of witchcraft'
infolabels.plot: REPORT 8944 Adam and Ham find themselves immersed in the chilling world of witchcraft when a beautiful young office secretary is murdered in brutal circumstances. Murder is one thing but as Adam finds out - the black-magic variety is difficult to solve.

items.title: S01E11 - RACIST 'A most dangerous proposal'
items.summary: REPORT 1553 An outspoken minister is shot at a party hosted by a young woman. Evidence mounts that indicate her father, the head of a racist organization, may be responsible, but he seems too willing to be arrested.

infolabels.title: RACIST 'A most dangerous proposal'
infolabels.plot: REPORT 1553 An outspoken minister is shot at a party hosted by a young woman. Evidence mounts that indicate her father, the head of a racist organization, may be responsible, but he seems too willing to be arrested.

items.title: S01E12 - SNIPER 'When is your cousin not?'
items.summary: REPORT 7931 Student demonstrations in an East European country, and murder, involve Adam Strange in a search for truth as well as a killer. Back in London. Ham comes up with a startling piece of evidence.

infolabels.title: SNIPER 'When is your cousin not?'
infolabels.plot: REPORT 7931 Student demonstrations in an East European country, and murder, involve Adam Strange in a search for truth as well as a killer. Back in London. Ham comes up with a startling piece of evidence.

items.title: S01E13 - X-RAY 'Who weeps for the doctor'
items.summary: REPORT 4821 A hospital staff dance later ends in tragedy with the unexpected death of a neuro-surgeon - following his angry outburst at colleagues before he storms out of the party. But is his death all that it seems - did he receive help to end his life, to prevent the even worse lingering death that he thought awaited him? Adam Strange seeks to find the truth with his trademark surgical precision.

infolabels.title: X-RAY 'Who weeps for the doctor'
infolabels.plot: REPORT 4821 A hospital staff dance later ends in tragedy with the unexpected death of a neuro-surgeon - following his angry outburst at colleagues before he storms out of the party. But is his death all that it seems - did he receive help to end his life, to prevent the even worse lingering death that he thought awaited him? Adam Strange seeks to find the truth with his trademark surgical precision.

items.title: S01E14 - KIDNAP 'Whose pretty girl are you?'
items.summary: REPORT 2493 When a beauty queen is 'kidnapped', Adam must find out whether the event has been organised as a publicity stunt or for real? If it's the latter, he has barely 24 hours to find the girl.

infolabels.title: KIDNAP 'Whose pretty girl are you?'
infolabels.plot: REPORT 2493 When a beauty queen is 'kidnapped', Adam must find out whether the event has been organised as a publicity stunt or for real? If it's the latter, he has barely 24 hours to find the girl.

items.title: S01E15 - HEART 'No Choice for the Donor'
items.summary: REPORT 4407 The police are baffled. A famous heart surgeon has been kidnapped but no random note is delivered nor is anything heard from abductors. Adam Strange is called in - and uncovers a most unusual reason for the man's disappearance.

infolabels.title: HEART 'No Choice for the Donor'
infolabels.plot: REPORT 4407 The police are baffled. A famous heart surgeon has been kidnapped but no random note is delivered nor is anything heard from abductors. Adam Strange is called in - and uncovers a most unusual reason for the man's disappearance.

items.title: S01E16 - SWINDLE 'Square root of evil'
items.summary: REPORT 4977 When a Bank of England company responsible for printing genuine bank notes are duped into carrying out a massive order for a gang of swindlers, Adam and Ham discover that greed lurks within.

infolabels.title: SWINDLE 'Square root of evil'
infolabels.plot: REPORT 4977 When a Bank of England company responsible for printing genuine bank notes are duped into carrying out a massive order for a gang of swindlers, Adam and Ham discover that greed lurks within.
